title: Voice Pipeline Audio Processing
description: Ingest audio input, run STT, pass transcript to agent workflow, receive text response, run TTS, output streaming audio
activity_flow: DECISION: isinstance(audio_input, AudioInput)? → _run_single_turn | isinstance(StreamedAudioInput)? → _run_multi_turn | else raise UserError
YES → create local_queue, spawn asyncio.Task _stream_audio(text, local_queue)
TRY workflow.on_start() → yield intro texts → output._add_text() for each
→ for each text_event: output._add_text(text_event) [same TTS buffering as single-turn]
→ TTSModel.run(text, tts_settings) [async generator of bytes chunks]
→ flush remaining buffer (pad if odd-length bytes)
_dispatch_audio(): ordered deque of local_queues; forwards events in order to main _queue
→ on turn_ended: _finish_turn() (closes tracing span, resets buffers)
→ when all queues drained and _completed_session: put VoiceStreamEventLifecycle 'session_ended'
key_decisions: AudioInput type → single-turn vs multi-turn path
STTModel lazy init: model object vs model name string vs default from provider
TTSModel lazy init: same pattern as STT
Text buffer threshold (>= 20 chars of combined sentences) → triggers async TTS task
finish_turn flag in _stream_audio → emits 'turn_ended' vs None sentinel
trace_include_sensitive_data / trace_include_sensitive_audio_data → controls what is stored in spans

key_classes_and_signatures.VoicePipeline.__init__: workflow: VoiceWorkflowBase, stt_model: STTModel|str|None, tts_model: TTSModel|str|None, config: VoicePipelineConfig|None
key_classes_and_signatures.StreamedAudioResult._add_text: async (text: str) → buffers, splits, spawns _stream_audio tasks
key_classes_and_signatures.StreamedAudioResult._stream_audio: async (text, local_queue, finish_turn=False) → streams TTS chunks
key_classes_and_signatures.StreamedAudioResult._dispatch_audio: async () → ordered forwarding from local_queues to main queue

key_relationships: StreamedAudioResult uses TTSModel to stream audio
important_notes: All audio output is non-blocking: StreamedAudioResult is returned immediately; processing runs in background asyncio tasks
Ordered audio dispatch: local_queues per TTS segment ensure audio order matches text order even with parallel TTS tasks
Tracing: each full session wrapped in TraceCtxManager; each TTS call gets speech_span; group of TTS calls gets speech_group_span
Multi-turn: supports streaming audio intro via workflow.on_start() before transcription begins
Text splitter (tts_settings.text_splitter) controls sentence boundary detection for TTS chunking
Audio dtype: int16 or float32; optional transform_data callback for custom post-processing
